# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

.mr_job_template:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID
      when: always
    - when: never # Only run on MR pipelines

build_job:
  extends: .mr_job_template
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "--- Build Started ---"
    - echo "Building for Merge Request: !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}"
    - echo "Title: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
    - echo "Description:"
    - echo "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}"
    - echo "--- Build Finished ---"
    # Simulate some build process
    - sleep 5
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build_output.txt # Example artifact
    expire_in: 1 day

deploy_job:
  extends: .mr_job_template
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine/git:latest # Use a lightweight image with git
  before_script:
    - git config user.name "GitLab CI"
    - git config user.email "gitlab-ci@example.com"
    - git remote set-url origin "https://gitlab-ci-token:${CI_JOB_TOKEN}@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git"
    - git fetch origin
    - git checkout ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME} # Checkout the current branch for making changes
  script:
    - echo "--- Deployment Started ---"
    - echo "Deploying for Merge Request: !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}"
    - echo "Title: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
    - echo "Description:"
    - echo "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}"

    # 1. Create a file demonstrating MR details in a commit
    - DEPLOY_INFO_FILE="deploy_info_${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.txt"
    - echo "Merge Request Title: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}" > $DEPLOY_INFO_FILE
    - echo "Merge Request Description:" >> $DEPLOY_INFO_FILE
    - echo "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}" >> $DEPLOY_INFO_FILE
    - echo "Deployed by pipeline ${CI_PIPELINE_ID} on ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}" >> $DEPLOY_INFO_FILE
    - cat $DEPLOY_INFO_FILE

    # 2. Commit the file with MR title/description in the commit message
    - git add $DEPLOY_INFO_FILE
    - COMMIT_MESSAGE="feat: Deploy for MR !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID} - ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
    - COMMIT_BODY="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}"
    - git commit -m "$COMMIT_MESSAGE" -m "$COMMIT_BODY" || echo "No changes to commit, skipping."
    - git push origin ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME} || echo "Could not push commit, check CI_JOB_TOKEN permissions."

    # 3. Create a deployment tag with MR title
    # Sanitize the MR title for tag name: replace spaces with hyphens, remove special chars
    - SANITIZED_MR_TITLE=$(echo "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}" | tr ' ' '-' | tr -cd '[:alnum:]-')
    - DEPLOY_TAG="deploy-mr-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}-${SANITIZED_MR_TITLE}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    - echo "Creating deployment tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
    - git tag -a ${DEPLOY_TAG} -m "Deployment for MR !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}" -m "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}"
    - git push origin ${DEPLOY_TAG} || echo "Could not push tag, check CI_JOB_TOKEN permissions."
    - echo "--- Deployment Finished ---"
